title: 6 Upcoming Dividend Increases
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average and median increase of 8.8%.

title: CDW Vs. TD Synnex: Which High-Tech Distributor Is The Best Investment For 2023?
text: TD-Synnex is a much larger company than CDW based on revenue. Both companies are trying to expand rather narrow margins by acquiring service companies.

title: CDW (CDW) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates

title: Tech Services Provider CDW Tops Earnings Goal But Sales Light
text: Tech services provider CDW beat estimates for earnings in the third quarter but sales were lighter than expected. The post Tech Services Provider CDW Tops Earnings Goal But Sales Light appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.
